XOnlineNotificationEnumerate

Creates an asynchronous task to enumerate notifications for the specified player.

Note    This function is currently not implemented and returns E_NOTIMPL.

HRESULT XOnlineNotificationEnumerate(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    PXONLINE_NOTIFICATION_MSG pbBuffer,
    WORD wBufferCount,
    DWORD dwNotificationTypes,
    HANDLE hEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player whose notifications are to be enumerated. The player must have been successfully logged on with a previous call to XOnlineLogon.
pbBuffer
[in] Pointer to a buffer that will receive the returned notification messages. The buffer must be large enough to hold at least one notification message.
wBufferCount
[in] Number of XONLINE_NOTIFICATION_MSG structures that will fit into the buffer pointed to by pbBuffer.
dwNotificationTypes
[in] Types of notifications to enumerate. Currently no valid values are defined for this parameter.
hEvent
[in] Handle to an event that will be signaled when there is work to be done on this task. This parameter can be NULL if no such event is required.
phTask
[out] Pointer to a variable of type XONLINETASK_HANDLE that receives a task handle representing this enumeration task. The handle can then be used in calls to XOnlineTaskContinue to perform work associated with this task.

Return Values

If the function succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

Remarks

This function is currently not implemented and returns E_NOTIMPL. Game invitations and friends list updates are handled by the friends list functions.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.
